case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. BRUNO FARIA DE AMORIM

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-06-2018 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED NOV-08-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DE AMORIM, BRUNO FARIA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,011.28 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DE AMORIM, BRUNO FARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-06-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 - SERVED NOV-08-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DE AMORIM, BRUNO FARIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-06-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-06-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED BY PRICILLA TOVAR, COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT BRUNO FARIA DE AMORIM DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DE AMORIM, BRUNO FARIA $870.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.56 INTEREST, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,065.56 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
